mcp>=1.0.0

# Tree-sitter: accurate AST parsing (replaces regex parsers where installed)
# Install the languages you need — uninstalled ones fall back to regex parsers
tree-sitter>=0.22
tree-sitter-python
tree-sitter-javascript
tree-sitter-typescript
tree-sitter-java
tree-sitter-go
tree-sitter-rust
tree-sitter-ruby
tree-sitter-c-sharp
tree-sitter-php
tree-sitter-kotlin
